# services.logcheck

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.logcheck`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.logcheck.config` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | Config options that you would like in logcheck.conf. |
| `services.logcheck.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable logcheck cron job, to mail anomalies in the system logfiles to the administrator. |
| `services.logcheck.extraGroups` | `list of string` | Extra groups for the logcheck user, for example to be able to use sendmail, or to access certain log files. |
| `services.logcheck.extraRulesDirs` | `list of absolute path` | Directories with extra rules. |
| `services.logcheck.files` | `list of absolute path` | Which log files to check. |
| `services.logcheck.ignore` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | This option defines extra ignore rules. |
| `services.logcheck.ignore.<name>.level` | `one of "workstation", "server", "paranoid"` | Set the logcheck level. |
| `services.logcheck.ignore.<name>.regex` | `string` | Regex specifying which log lines to ignore. |
| `services.logcheck.ignoreCron` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | This option defines extra ignore rules for cronjobs. |
| `services.logcheck.ignoreCron.<name>.cmdline` | `string` | Command line for the cron job. Will be turned into a regex for the logcheck ignore rule. |
| `services.logcheck.ignoreCron.<name>.timeArgs` | `null or string` | "min hr dom mon dow" crontab time args, to auto-create a cronjob too. Leave at null to not do this and just add a logcheck ignore rule. |
| `services.logcheck.ignoreCron.<name>.user` | `string` | User that runs the cronjob. |
| `services.logcheck.level` | `string` | Set the logcheck level. Either "workstation", "server", or "paranoid". |
| `services.logcheck.mailTo` | `string` | Email address to send reports to. |
| `services.logcheck.timeOfDay` | `string` | Time of day to run logcheck. A logcheck will be scheduled at xx:02 each day. Leave default (\*) to run every hour. Of course when nothing special was logged, logcheck will be silent. |
| `services.logcheck.user` | `string` | Username for the logcheck user. |
